howItWorks.title: How Menu Diario works
howItWorks.description: Learn how to plan meals, share menus and check your schedule from any device.
howItWorks.heroTitle: Plan group meals without the mess
howItWorks.heroDescription: Menu Diario helps you write down what everyone will eat each day, coordinate changes with others and reuse dishes that worked well.
howItWorks.stepGroupDescription: Share the menu with your family, partner, flatmates or any group that decides meals together.
howItWorks.stepPlanDescription: Edit each day from your phone, reuse saved dishes and add notes when needed.
howItWorks.stepReviewDescription: See what is coming next, spot empty days and bring back ideas from previous weeks.
howItWorks.benefitMobile: Mobile-friendly editing without spreadsheets or endless chat threads.
howItWorks.benefitShared: Shared planning so everyone can see changes as they happen.
howItWorks.benefitHistory: Dish history to repeat favorites and avoid eating the same things too often.
howItWorks.finalDescription: Fill in a few days, invite your group and adjust the menu when plans change. The app adapts to your rhythm.
